title: Monday Fields Dissapeared
excerpt: Hi there - I have the strangest thing that is happening. I have a zapier that is connected to a web hook. Has been working fine. I went in to make one small modification and all a sudden all my monday fields disspeared. …

posts.author: thynkconsultinggroup (Alexa DAgostino)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there - I have the strangest thing that is happening. I have a zapier that is connected to a web hook. Has been working fine. I went in to make one small modification and all a sudden all my monday fields disspeared. They are IN monday but they are now not showing up in the zapier.

You will see the image below only has 4 fields when the Monday workspace we have has over 20 fields. this was working perfectly fine a day ago. Any idea why the fields dissapeared?

Screen Shot 2023-03-02 at 1.14.06 PM904×793 36.6 KB

posts.author: Vtab (Vero Tabares)
posts.cookedHtml: I just received the following error from Zapier: ‘NoneType’ object has no attribute ‘get’

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I would not be able to tell why this is the case in your Zapier scenario.

In this case, you would have to contact Zapier about it.

If the support team from Zapier believes the issue is on our end, you can then contact appsupport@monday.com (our technical support team) with the information provided by Zapier so that we can take a look into it.

Cheers,
Matias
